parameters.query:
WITH candidate AS (
  SELECT attachments.id
  FROM inbox.attachments
  WHERE attachments.telegram_file_id IS NOT NULL
    AND attachments.upload_status IN ('metadata_only', 'pending', 'failed')
    AND ($1::text = '' OR attachments.id = $1::uuid)
  ORDER BY attachments.created_at
  LIMIT 1
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
),
claimed AS (
  UPDATE inbox.attachments AS attachments
  SET upload_status = 'uploading',
      storage_provider = 'backblaze_b2',
      storage_bucket = $2::text,
      storage_error = NULL
  FROM candidate
  WHERE attachments.id = candidate.id
  RETURNING attachments.*
)
SELECT
  claimed.id::text AS attachment_id,
  claimed.inbox_item_id::text AS inbox_item_id,
  items.user_id::text AS user_id,
  claimed.telegram_file_id,
  claimed.original_name,
  claimed.mime_type,
  claimed.size_bytes,
  claimed.storage_bucket,
  concat(
    'users/', items.user_id::text, '/',
    to_char(claimed.created_at, 'YYYY/MM'), '/',
    claimed.id::text, '/',
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(claimed.original_name, claimed.id::text), '[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+', '_', 'g')
  ) AS object_key
FROM claimed
JOIN inbox.inbox_items AS items ON items.id = claimed.inbox_item_id;

UPDATE inbox.attachments
SET upload_status = 'stored',
    storage_provider = 'backblaze_b2',
    storage_bucket = $2::text,
    object_key = $3::text,
    storage_class = 'STANDARD',
    uploaded_at = now(),
    encryption = 'provider-managed',
    storage_error = NULL
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id::text AS attachment_id, storage_provider, storage_bucket, object_key, upload_status, uploaded_at;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Claim Pending Attachment').item.json.attachment_id, $('Claim Pending Attachment').item.json.storage_bucket, $('Claim Pending Attachment').item.json.object_key ] }}
